description: Send notifications to your own SimplePush destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise spush:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native SimplePush JSON payload directly to the SimplePush API.
name: msg-to-simplepush

request.template: {"urls":"spush://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"key":"${ customer_secrets.SIMPLEPUSH_APIKEY }","msg":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"key":"${ customer_secrets.SIMPLEPUSH_APIKEY }","msg":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
